playbook.name: New Emails on Matters
playbook.description: Notifies users when new emails have been received on their assigned matters since the last check. Resolves matter memberships via the LookupUserMembership node (R3 FR-1C.2 / A1 defect remediation) and filters inbound emails by those matter IDs within the configurable timeWindow parameter.

timeWindow.label: Time window
timeWindow.description: How far back to look for new emails

configJson.description: Scoped to the current user's assigned matters (resolved via LookupUserMembership node)

Resolve the executing user's matter memberships (owner + assigned attorney + assigned paralegal). Replaces the original query that lacked any user-membership filter and would return inbound emails on every matter in the tenant (R3 FR-1C.2 / A1 defect). Resolved IDs are bound to `myMatters.ids` for downstream filtering via {{joinIds myMatters.ids}}.

configJson.fetchXml: <fetch top='50'><entity name='email'><attribute name='subject'/><attribute name='sender'/><attribute name='createdon'/><attribute name='regardingobjectid'/><attribute name='activityid'/><filter type='and'><condition attribute='directioncode' operator='eq' value='0'/><condition attribute='createdon' operator='ge' value='{{sinceTimestamp}}'/><condition attribute='regardingobjectid' operator='in' value='{{joinIds myMatters.ids}}'/></filter><link-entity name='sprk_matter' from='sprk_matterid' to='regardingobjectid' link-type='inner' alias='matter'><attribute name='sprk_name'/></link-entity><order attribute='createdon' descending='true'/></entity></fetch>
configJson.description: Retrieve inbound emails regarding the executing user's matters (matter IDs from myMatters.ids) received within the configured time window.
Check if any new emails were found

configJson.title: You have {{newEmails.output.count}} new email(s) on your matters
